description_long: This house features a complex, multi-level structure with a prominent gabled roof and a large, covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior is characterized by a striking black-and-white geometric pattern, with a brick chimney rising from the center of the roof. The house sits on a landscaped plot with sloped grassy areas and a raised foundation, and includes multiple decks and staircases leading to the main entrance. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped in rows and others spaced irregularly. The main entryway is accentuated by a wide staircase, a covered porch, and decorative railings. The overall design blends traditional residential elements with bold, modern visual motifs.
description: A large, multi-story house with a gabled roof, bold black-and-white exterior patterns, and a spacious covered porch with columns and railings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with a wide staircase, covered porch, and prominent gabled roof, as well as the geometric exterior pattern and landscaped yard.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the house, the extended porch area, and the sloped terrain along the side.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals additional decks, a secondary entrance, and a more detailed look at the window arrangements and landscaping.
description_view_3: The right side view emphasizes the multi-level roof structure, the side yard, and the continuation of the geometric exterior pattern.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide staircase leading to a covered porch with columns, decorative railings, and a prominent main door
